ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the song */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the song belongs to */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the song in seconds */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL where the song can be accessed */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song contains explicit content */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the music source */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the song */,
  "year_released" INTEGER /* Year the song was released */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number of the song in the album */,
  "album_position" TEXT /* Position of the song in the album */,
  "is_single" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song is a single */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES music_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the artist belongs to */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the artist */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the artist */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Date of death of the artist (if applicable) */,
  "social_media_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's social media profile */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's image */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the artist is currently active */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL to the album cover art */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label of the album */,
  "sales" INTEGER /* Number of units sold */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Album certification (e.g., Gold, Platinum) */,
  "is_compilation" INTEGER /* Indicates if the album is a compilation */,
  "is_live_album" INTEGER /* Indicates if the album is a live recording */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genres) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the genre image */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "music_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each music source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the music source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the music source */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the music source */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the music source is active */,
  "last_synced" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last synchronization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_genres" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., curator, analyst, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User's music preferences */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the playlist was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the playlist was last modified */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the playlist is public */,
  "collaborative" INTEGER /* Indicates if the playlist is collaborative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the song was added to the playlist */,
  "added_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the song to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_added_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("added_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the song */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the song was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., stream, download) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
